scripts.dev: concurrently -n fit-api,fit-web,meals-api,meals-web -c blue,cyan,magenta,green "pnpm --filter fit-server dev" "pnpm --filter fit-client dev" "pnpm --filter meals-server dev" "pnpm --filter meals-client dev"
scripts.start: echo 'Set a Custom Start Command on the Railway service (e.g. pnpm --filter fit-client start)' && exit 1
